message:
feat(render-canvas): add UML three-compartment class box rendering

Canvas2D renderer now displays class diagram nodes with
class_meta as three-compartment UML boxes matching the SVG and
terminal renderers:

- Header with bold class name + generic parameters (e.g., "List<T>")
- Horizontal separator lines between compartments
- Attributes section with visibility symbols (+/-/#/~)
- Methods section with visibility symbols
- Graceful truncation when box height is insufficient
- Falls back to centered label for nodes without class_meta

All three renderers (SVG, terminal, canvas) now have consistent
three-compartment class diagram rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
